## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐛 Fix (typo, broken link, wrong fact, bug)
- [ ] 📝 New content (concept, guide, tutorial)
- [ ] 🏃 New or updated example (runnable code)
- [ ] 🎨 Diagram / visual improvement

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Part of #45". Leave blank if none. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
      (e.g. `docs(rag): add reranking diagram`).
- [ ] I followed the [content contract](../CONTRIBUTING.md#the-content-contract) (for new pages).
- [ ] I previewed my changes locally (`mkdocs serve`) if they affect the docs site.
- [ ] Links are relative and working.
- [ ] For code: it **runs**, has pinned deps, a `.env.example`, and at least one test.
- [ ] I added any new technical terms to `.cspell-dict.txt` if spell-check flagged them.
- [ ] I agree to license my contribution under the repo's terms (CC-BY-4.0 docs / MIT code).

<!-- Open questions, tradeoffs, or areas you'd like feedback on. -->
